action: Open the Start menu by clicking the Windows icon, type 'Notepad', and open the Notepad application.
fallback_action: Perform a Google search using Internet Explorer

recipe.steps:
is the first action. The task is to open the Start menu by clicking the Windows icon. The Windows icon is typically located at the bottom left of the screen and is represented here by Box ID 117. I will click this icon to open the Start menu.
Action Description: Click the Windows icon to open the Start menu.

previous action: The previous step was to click the Windows icon (Box ID 117) to open the Start menu. On the current screen, the Start menu is now visible with the search bar ('Search for apps, settings; and documents', Box ID 5) and various app icons. This confirms the Start menu has opened successfully. The next step is to type 'Notepad' into the search bar to search for the Notepad application.
Action Description: Type 'Notepad' into the Start menu search bar to search for the Notepad application.

previous action: The previous step was to type 'Notepad' into the Start menu search bar. On the current screen, I can see that the search results have updated and the Notepad application is now visible as an option in the Start menu. The expected outcome is present. The next step is to open the Notepad application by clicking on its icon in the search results.
Action Description: Click the Notepad application icon in the Start menu to open Notepad.
